title: fagelia verticillata
intro: Fagelia verticillata, also known as Sweet Fagelia, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fagelia verticillata include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Fagelia verticillata typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat a variety of ailments.
